title: Elections You Can Trust.
hero.description: De.Vote is a blockchain-powered, privacy-first voting platform secured by our patented TrustZone technology — making every election transparent, anonymous, and tamper-proof.

featureSectionTitle: Built for trust at every step
featureSectionSubtitle: Every vote is private, fair, and independently verifiable — backed by the strongest cryptographic guarantees.

feature.title: Anonymous by Design
feature.desc: Your ballot is completely untraceable. Not even system administrators can link a vote to a voter — guaranteed by cryptography, not just policy.

feature.title: Tamper-Proof Results
feature.desc: Every vote is cryptographically verified to originate from a legitimate source, ensuring election outcomes are authentic and manipulation-free.

feature.title: Verify Your Own Vote
feature.desc: After casting your ballot, independently confirm that your vote was recorded and counted exactly as intended — no blind trust required.

title: About
Us
about.intro: De.Vote is a nonpartisan spin-off startup of the Logos Lab at National Tsing Hua University, founded under the guidance of Prof. Ren-Song Tsay. We're on a mission to make elections more trustworthy, private, and fair for everyone.
about.left: The most trusted platform for secure, anonymous elections.

middle.title: Our Team
middle.content: A multidisciplinary team of information security experts, blockchain researchers, and product engineers from National Tsing Hua University.

right.title: Our Mission
right.content: To make every election trustworthy, efficient, and secure — empowering voters and institutions with technology they can rely on.

row1.name: Ren Song Tsay
row1.title: Mentor
row1.role: Serial entrepreneur with two Silicon Valley companies, both successfully acquired.

row1.name: Wei En Tsai
row1.title: CEO
row1.role: Champion of multiple national entrepreneurship competitions; led De.Vote from a university lab prototype to a funded, production-ready startup.

row1.name: Guan Xue Li
row1.title: COO
row1.role: Doctoral research in high-security, high-scalability electronic voting systems.

row2.name: Tzu Hsuan Su
row2.title: CTO
row2.role: Specializes in blockchain development and scalable distributed system architecture.

row2.name: Hsiang Ting Peng
row2.title: CMO
row2.role: Expert in data analysis, information security intelligence, and project coordination.

row2.name: Borhan Lee
row2.title: CFO
row2.role: Developed Bitcoin hardware wallets on TrustZone; deep expertise in blockchain security.
